h8eeb3dadgcbb8g4efcg9e46g5e01937389b3: You. Godsdammit, I warned you to stay away from my kids.
h8ce23db2g35feg41baga525g3701da3e0dd3: What comes next is on you.
h09fa7a7dgd6fag40b7gbef4ga058a55a2b49: I'm done with you. You better hope we don't have to talk again.
h0afe7b65g96c0g4303ga461g3d1fd48e712c: Well, look who's come to visit.
h5dc185f8gbbb6g483dg975cgea36e0c9a89a: My kids say you've been busy since you got here.
h7dedac30g9357g4197ga607gac91d8c2df9c: You let that adventurer hit Meli.
heeb92488g9121g490ag9e71gf82b1a1b4918: You scared the life out of little Silfy.
hcbcbe4cbgd0f5g47ddgb005g5ff0fbdee995: Now, you're going to pay for it.
he19654ceg68abg4e0egb3e3g3a279efec0dc: You're about as intimidating as a flail snail in a salt mine.
h5d2a0593g5b66g43c7ga18cg012de9a6a5b4: You think that's funny? Fine, laugh at this.
h454cc8e4g2ac1g42bag80cag444735c9efae: I don't think I'll be paying for anything. Bye for now!
h27934608g8a68g4753gb624g80ef9739b003: You're right. I won't mess with any of your gang again. Promise.
h30cb1208ge2f7g480cg94e4gb7dccc481b6a: Still, you got Arabella out of that mess with the druids.
hcc6c8265g417dg4a49g8d90g5de69aed6117: And for that, you get one more chance.
h491ba3d5g54a0g47daga321g0837bb745f21: Still, you helped Meli get away from the adventurer.
h243468eeg1c27g41e1g8632g8145b0a17d8d: Still, you showed you're one of us by taking Mattis' ring. Never saw you coming, did he?
h14b831f6g9aaag4a95gb74ag2dc5050e4286: Still, you gave Mattis' ring back. Taught him a lesson doing it, too.
h68038256g4ee7g49efg9dccg680d06fdc527: Still, you went easy on Silfy even though you caught her in your pockets.
hc7123351g6424g484ag8a57g7604d11116cb: Still, one of my guards said you were nice to him.
hd0ac6580gc33ag4930g86f7g077544faa30c: Still, you've been a friend to us so far.
h16abe3a9gdef2g42a7gadf4g94b0fac38e37: I'll go tell the guards you're pushing us around. See you around, chump.
hf8a73c35g6ef1g4bdaga47cg80860007dd77: Nobody messes with my family - I'm all they've got.
h97a6e532g9ec0g4f12g967dg2aff3409bf45: I didn't mean to cause trouble for your people. Should have been more careful.
h11f61978g4f44g4f72gb781g372d4d47406d: Is that right? Fine, you get one more chance.
hff87372egfb8bg453ag8745ge0f944c60376: You're pests, the lot of you. Stay out of my way, or else.
h5fec8821g5702g4aaaga4abgedad8fbd359d: That's the way you want it? Fine.
h169e4dcfg28b1g4374gae0ag0634d0db5ba5: Ugh, get out of my head!
h3cf6a0c8g2fadg4292gb366g65fea8b45de8: That's it. I'm telling the guards what you did. Everything you did!
h1116bf3ag0127g4839gb965g6e960ccee1c0: If you don't get out of my way, I'll tear your spine out, whelp.
h9fa753e0g0e40g48c4g8551g2c52d6be27a9: ... fine. But make any more trouble for us and you'll regret it, drow or not.
habfbc12dg342dg431dg8ee1gb36ba51c24e0: I had a feeling you'd be back.
h539f04b8g7d72g49aagb96eg4a3e966b2478: My gang says you've been messing with them. Don't deny it.
h4249ac3fg8558g4617g84dcge5c46050bb83: And I hear you have a problem.
h3dfb74cag9f77g4154g9b17g5b22dbd570ad: A few things are missing from your pack. Is that right?
hf948f97agb850g4312ga1e6g6a233dc886dc: I heard you helped Meli with that locket. I owe you for that.
h7135da4cg1d13g43afgb65ag048a581ae2a3: Mirkon says you got him out of a tight spot with some Harpies. Gotta say, I'm impressed.
h334f7bdege502g49c1gbe32g8df987dacfee: You saved Arabella from the druids. Don't know what those bastards would have done.
h65bae8ecgc359g4a66g9c46g57a1c7aa1a93: And thanks for going easy on Silfy. Not many marks would've done the same.
h805b8d25gf638g4e90g9f9ege180092471df: I appreciate you teaching Mattis a lesson, too. Kid should be more careful with his rings.
h93e1d59dg991eg4e1fg9ca9g65466a9ef388: And we're happy to be helped. Now, what can I do for you?
h21e76df4g0a45g4dbcga69fg6a12107a9b49: Why're you running all these schemes and swindles? Risky, you know.
hb14e1a35g4fe4g402agb5e0gbee28e999608: You'd better keep these kids in check. They won't get off so lightly forever.
h171ee42fg1866g436aga79aga130033f0eef: Is that a fact? I'll tell them to watch their step.
h481f5554gdcd6g433dga332g868fb7966665: Anyway. You want to talk? Talk.
h5b7b9e53g093bg4cccg9d98g654c3fe0b7f7: What're you doing down in this cave?
hceede213g6db1g4ac0g99e4gf875675aa89e: Making sure we're ready to leave when the time comes.
hacdbc5d3gdcccg4e56gb789gadd7583a385c: Why're you running all these schemes and swindles? Risky, you know.
hc425c5edg5f16g4c4ag9893ge7abe3383ab7: We're saving up for a better hideout when we get to Baldur's Gate.
h1c37bfbfgf29dg4267ga771g3f8286ae70c7: Why, you planning on telling me stealing is wrong?
h3f0c4524g95c2g4757g9c9dg74a852a0e0a2: Yes. You're taking advantage during bad times. There's words for folk like that.
h778de003g765cg4188g8095g87358a39e4aa: So what? Should we be panicking like everyone else?
hdf1dd699g5292g4f46g81c9g565a13ed3b22: We have a plan. We're the ones who'll end up on top in the Gate. Anything else?
hf297fffbg2bb6g45c6gbf10g31d85181e8fe: Quite the opposite. I want to invest in the newest Thieves Guild on the Sword Coast.  ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54])
h1adecd1eg3aaeg4c39ga4a3g9e0b436edf16: Won't turn down free money. I've got operating costs you wouldn't believe.
hd4798524gb054g4f72gada5gdf37d2079470: Come see me in the city sometime, huh? I'll repay this and then some.
hef724550g754bg40cagadcbg504343c9d2c6: Not at all. You've got foresight - that'll help you to survive.
h97e8931dg1d5dg4fd3ga01dgcb6abf3b24d6: Foresight's the least of what we've got going, but thanks.
hed4ffb3bg5151g491cgadb6g9324a9b4d8e0: I'm not your mother. Do as you please.
h5fb79052g710ag4990g85a3gbdfe069c4c7a: I'm not your father. Do as you please.
h0f8e934bgcf6dg4096gba14g2653730b913c: Didn't need your permission, but fine.
h23b28f55g16bdg4d9dg99acg371243cb0eee: Thought you might need help with something.
haa2c3fe3g5d4eg4240gbbb4gaed6619caf0b: Nothing comes to mind. Always eager to accept donations though..
h63919074g0232g41c4gae4agf35192a7fb26: I do as a matter of fact. Revenge.
ha12ce3f0g0a63g4328gaa7bg739ce5c5d3f8: The bastards that killed Arabella. She was a precious little thing; like a sister to me.
h8858e15fg8b39g43d2gb123g6be55ad0a5c3: I want to steal that big shiny idol they're all chanting at.
h1c3b31d5g87d4g4e06g84aag2bbf3411a0bf: An idol? What'll you do with something like that?
he1316e76gf460g4840gab1cga2298a63b8ac: The important thing is to get it away from them. That ritual's gonna get us all killed.
h13876e0egc467g40d9g8f10g2e5cce50d566: And we can sell it once we get to the city. Might be worth enough to pay a priest to bring Arabella back.
h0e563ef0gaaf0g46b9g99adg90b4805591fc: And we can sell it once we get to the city. Thing like that's gotta be worth a small fortune.
h1ad968bfg2318g48bfg958dgcac97cb494e3: I could help you get it, but my time's valuable to me.
h6a4e0b2eg4446g4e20g8e8egdbbf3435726f: Sure. When we sell it in the city, I'll make sure you get your cut.
hc677d41dg69e7g4697gb712g33f5b32929a3: I'll see what I can do.
h7365c8cbg346dg40fbgbccag9152f798d4e8: Be careful. They look brittle as old bark, but they're vicious.
h11775af3g159fg4eb2gb2cbg31718ea1809f: Count me out - I'm not getting involved.
h542379d4g8885g4633g9a1fgaf067fcf45ff: Figures. Don't think you've got the stones for the job anyhow.
h8e43a2c3g648ag453cg9cf9g2889bcc9100f: That 'big shiny idol' is part of a sacred ritual. Don't you have any respect?
he9f37c2dg0b3fg4605gb100g71b7e35fcce6: They're murderers. I'd spit in the eye of any god the likes of them worship.
h91295a68g2409g422agb447g29d9613bfe15: That ritual's nothing more than a fancy way to kick us out, and leave us for dead.
hb74bf49bgf74fg4ebag82feg468759ebcf7c: You saw what those bastards that run the place were doing to Arabella. Scaring the precious mite.
h114dd4e2g451ag4c38gaf73g152349de11ed: I'm shy a few of my belongings - one of your associates robbed me.
h169bd0ccg4b4dg4545g887cg722616b12629: Sure. Silfy probably grabbed them by mistake.
h3f9d1271gc6cfg4eb9g8386gfdd15ccaf9d4: Here you go. Won't happen again.
h72d39aeegccb9g4800g8224g85f504e2d786: And to make sure none of the kids on the job outside mess with you, show them this:
h058e8ef9ga49ag48b1gbea4g962670ce3956: I'm not joining your little criminal gang.
h185f65bdg448bg4eebg82e4g54ea06bb06ac: You got it. Now, we done here or what?
h761c4c1bg5a4cg4c8fga785g07d1e6bba1b3: We took this off you before. Some of it's missing, feels like. But there you go.
h82d3c0e5g27d9g4cb4gaa23gcc3308729ba4: Sure. Silfy probably grabbed them by mistake.
hb69e7964gd485g4da5ga988g1b727484f977: Maybe one of the kids picked up something of yours by mistake. I couldn't say.
h57728907gec16g49d1g9326ge817ba064ec3: Might help if you pay the inspection fee. I could take a look.  ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_2_463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca])
he7fe4b46g4d1eg4f8bg8c0egd7761b76c265: Much appreciated. Let's take a look.
h4b3f0882g564eg4e60g9988g75e7282df539: Give me what's mine, or I'll rip your bloody tail off.
h3ea0bc54g07d4g4f25gb381g66d2a5a10203: Threats, huh? The stones on you. Have it your way.
h29f56bcdgfa22g4f1agb87bg8a94c049f4f0: You idiot. What comes next is on you.
h727d47c4gd41bg4a3bgbbbbga7fcaf9c2adc: I'm sure this was a misunderstanding. My things cost me a lot... I really need them back.
hd06aaed3g2883g4891ga8deg2edb36b348e4: Honesty and politeness. I like that.
h333e88c3g9278g4fb6g8d75g8eb71e637e7f: You know what else costs a lot? That inspection fee.
hc097c875gd65bg4ee9ga492g221869c96551: I forgot it went up last week. Anyway, pay up, and I'll see what I can do. ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_2_463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca])
h52c53dd8g533eg48bfgb77cg33bddb2969d8: Don't be ridiculous. I'm not giving you anything.
hd3d318c2g9289g4c7fg9bcdg9354d55d10ba: Then I'm not looking for your stuff. That was easy. Anything else?
h219a2d3ag9f69g44f5ga89ag8a42f6be6397: Might help if you pay the inspection fee. I could take a look.  ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54])
h01c14508gaa2eg479ega3d4gd168105a44ff: Looks like some of my possessions have gone 'missing'. Again.
h0e4e4bf2gef0cg4a9fg88dbg03f03ae0fe0d: Ready to pay that inspection fee now? ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54])
hce0450a4g4141g4c9bg8859gc26989be18ed: There's nothing else to be said, for now.
h43402ab6ged09g498agb537gbb766d7567db: You got your junk back. Take it and get out.
h894a8131g0ab6g4813g885eg0bdc898ebb1b: Well, it's been a pleasure. You know the way out.
h9daf86e5ga054g47acga584g9dce9bb6ad9e: Thanks. See you in Baldur's Gate, I hope. Now scram, before I get emotional.
h221c7483gd575g4bb9gb57egc18e40565df1: Not sure what came of that idol you wanted. Looks like you're out of luck this time.
h49229773geb2dg4abag9964gaedf45dd638f: Damn it. Having that stashed away would have made life a lot easier.
hd0e9c50agdc75g4f91g8a66g6ed96526923c: I didn't touch the idol. Don't know what happened to it.
h803a59e9g24b8g4baag9a80geb4ced0c4a57: You're a terrible liar. We had a deal.
ha0f7f9efg96b1g4eedgbf9cga4261a0e61ff: And now the deal's off. See you around.
h863acf85g548bg4163g9d8cg1c68a0f2c75c: Fine. Hope the damn thing's cursed.
h5b24d38ag763dg4535g8228gc82f9e9d7ac8: Here's some free advice, more valuable than gold: don't bargain, just take.
h8e728253g5791g4eb5g949dg8efba8c92f0b: Sounds more like a challenge than advice. Keep an eye on your pack.
h7f66087eg4761g4083gad2fgb8965e4befbf: Do you have anything to trade?
h23b0e6c0gcf3eg4624gbf6cg11b9961ef0bc: If you change your mind about that fee, you know where to find me.
h017e7803ga9aag4fc6gbd8fgfa5d69d74d49: Don't come back unless you want to talk business.
hf9d3ad8ag44e8g40e2g92dcgeb6ef41e8f92: You've been a friend to us. Come back anytime.
hea28f0d5g8970g42bbgbd2eg0107b433f5ba: What're you doing down in this cave?
h41580291g7f13g4403gb767g62185e38fd87: Making sure we're ready to leave when the time comes.
h7cee692cgeca0g4165g876agf8602093cd7b: I appreciate you teaching Mattis a lesson, too. Kid should be more careful with his rings.
h4c158084g6d21g4113ga426g15301bdd06cc: Maybe we can do something about this.
h1589d67eg6bb1g4ab8g916cga614f325c55e: Anyway. You want to talk? Talk.
h99969ea2gab80g4ff8g9368g0471f3ab0e58: I told you to leave. What happens next is your fault.
h53ad294fgb0e6g4419ga2b8g8830b2a1de9e: Not sure why you're poking your nose in our business, though.
h8f4bd44ag393bg4062ga7efg856f6ac2fc0f: I don't even know what your business is.
hfecb9242g8395g4295g91d0g7dac81f1a658: This is our hideout, but hey, maybe you didn't know.
h812ea2cag3f4cg4324ga462g1983369fbb44: Because of that, I'll give you a ten-count to leave.
h0cb672b9ga0edg42f8gb672g7242fc7f75ee: Nothing piques my interest more than being told to stay away from somewhere.
h0fd6cbccg534dg4c09gbefbg20b38d0afa85: We have that in common, then. But you aren't welcome here.
h5620f09ag000fg426cg9e8cg86cbd96642bd: Poking your nose in other people's business is the best way to get rich, I find.
h7009749bg5f8bg4edbg808bgc8fa6fd19e6a: You ready tell me what sort of racket you're running down here?
ha53b4176g0b83g4781g8b2fgf54f29abeed0: We have nothing to talk about.
h7b8d8b4bg6474g4e6bgb243g165c48f72ab1: I told you to leave. What happens next is your fault.
h9738b54dg6856g474bgb19cg000168516b3c: I go where I like - told you already. And I'll tell you again if I have to.
h667bd74dg8cd2g4144ga01bgc2c7d507467a: Fine, then. What happens next is your fault.
ha7621226g3cb9g4d96g8c38ga3308dea1bea: Had a feeling you'd be back.
h267a103bg4bfeg4e64g9484gf9e5136440e3: I had a feeling you'd be back.
h6e73ed17g6c6cg48aag9d0fgb0b2d8205761: Little slow on the uptake, aren't you?
